collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (5 total Queries, 5 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_products, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_products, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 AND stock_qty BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_stock_products, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 AND stock_qty = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS out_of_stock_products FROM `products`

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_products, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_products, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 AND stock_qty BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_stock_products, SUM(CASE WHEN is_active = 1 AND stock_qty = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS out_of_stock_products FROM `products`
